edits.old_text: This Work Instruction outlines the procedure for monitoring coolant concentration in the Horizontal CNC Machining Center (2847.310.0042) and the Vertical Turning Lathe (2847.310.0061). Maintaining proper coolant concentration is essential to ensure optimal machining performance and adherence to the Acme Industrial Quality Standard (AIQS) guidelines, specifically per AIQS 2.2.1.
edits.new_text: This Work Instruction outlines the procedure for monitoring coolant concentration in the Horizontal CNC Machining Center (2847.310.0043) and the Vertical Turning Lathe (2847.310.0061). Maintaining proper coolant concentration is essential to ensure optimal machining performance and adherence to the Acme Industrial Quality Standard (AIQS) guidelines, specifically per AIQS 2.2.1.

edits.old_text: 1. **Preparation**: Confirm that the Horizontal CNC Machining Center (2847.310.0042) and Vertical Turning Lathe (2847.310.0061) are operational and have been subjected to an Operational Readiness Review (ORR) prior to monitoring.
